add_params.name: CreateTags
add_params.description: Array of tag objects to create: [{Name, Type, Comment, RetentionAction, AgeLimitForRetention, RetentionEnabled, LocalizedComment, LocalizedRetentionPolicyTagName}]. Sent when isEdit=false.

add_params.name: ModifyTags
add_params.description: Array of tag modification objects: [{Identity: original name, Name?, Comment?, RetentionAction?, AgeLimitForRetention?, RetentionEnabled?, LocalizedComment?, LocalizedRetentionPolicyTagName?}]. Sent when isEdit=true.

add_params.name: DeleteTags
add_params.description: Array of tag identity strings to delete. Not sent by this form but accepted by PS1.

notes: customDataformatter wraps form fields into CreateTags or ModifyTags array based on isEdit. For create: CreateTags[0] = {Type: unwrapped string value, Name, Comment, RetentionAction: unwrapped string, AgeLimitForRetention: parseInt(), RetentionEnabled, LocalizedComment?, LocalizedRetentionPolicyTagName?}. For edit: ModifyTags[0] = {Identity: name (from router), ...same optional fields}. Type is excluded from ModifyTags (cannot change type after creation). RetentionAction and Type autocomplete objects are unwrapped to .value strings.
x_cipp_warnings: customDataformatter is present on the CippFormPage for this endpoint. Form field names and/or types may be renamed or restructured before POST. Verify the transformer function in the frontend page file and correct param names/types accordingly.
